arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Leicester City Premier League clash simulated to get a score prediction
arts.sum: Goals from Riccardo Calafiori and Gabriel saw Arsenal earn a 2-2 draw away to Manchester City in their last Premier League outing, with the draw keeping the Gunners two points off top spot after five games. Arsenal will be looking to stay hot on the heels of the Premier League leaders with three points against Leicester City later today.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta backed to make unpopular Ethan Nwaneri decision ahead of Arsenal vs Leicester City - Tom Canton
arts.sum: The absence of Martin Odegaard has opened the door to Nwaneri and Arteta has indeed already given his thoughts on the matter when it was put to him after Wednesday night’s game. The same could then happen against PSG and with the hosting of another relegation battler, Southampton, next week and a trip to Bournemouth the gameweek after there are chances for Nwaneri to be given a start.

arts.ttl: 'He's a top class player': Kai Havertz says one Arsenal summer signing really surprised him
arts.sum: Arsenal enjoyed a pretty fruitful summer on the transfer front, bringing in several key signings which have improved the quality of Mikel Arteta’s squad. Italy...

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Leicester: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: After a chaotic week, Arsenal are hoping for greater serenity up until the October international break and their kinder domestic run continues at home to Leicester City on Saturday afternoon. Arteta also noted after the Bolton win that David Raya, Jurrien Timber and Ben White are all doubts heading into Saturday's game.

arts.ttl: 'You'll see': Mikel Arteta says Arsenal have a truly 'unbelievable' talent in their ranks who's set to explode
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has been putting his players through their paces ahead of Saturday’s Premier League meeting with Leicester City. The Gunners are in...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta set to add surprising name to Arsenal coaching staff
arts.sum: There’s little doubt that Mikel Arteta has made great strides as Arsenal first-team coach, with only silverware needed to cement his legacy at the club. The team he has put together bears little resemblance to the one he inherited, and they’re playing a brand of winning football that’s also easy on the eye. It’s a […] The post Mikel Arteta set to add surprising name to Arsenal coaching staff appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Three changes Cooper must make to earn Leicester City their first win
arts.sum: It’s the final game of September and Leicester City are still without a victory in the Premier League. City have come through five games so far without snatching three points, so what needs to happen to finally get that first win?

arts.ttl: 'I was offered big money to join Arsenal after transfer talks - here's why I snubbed them'
arts.sum: Jamie Vardy has explained that the Gunners came knocking for his signature after the star striker won the Premier League with Leicester City - but he wasn't keen on a move to north London
